signals.npcLine: Crypto tides barely ripple, shadows hide the real moves.
signals.questPulse: Market waters churn with cautious fear; stay alert for shifts.
signals.worldFeed: Global cryptomarkets hover, whispering uncertain gains.
signals.clueEvent: Silent spikes detected in unknown assets, proceed with care.

signals.npcLine: Token mutts like APE and CHIP are sniffing for scraps.
signals.questPulse: Follow the small fry's dance, patterns may reveal larger plays.
signals.worldFeed: Low score tokens flicker, possibly distractions or sleeper cells.
signals.clueEvent: Unseen hands pump low-value chips; probe deeper for intent.

signals.npcLine: Grass grows quiet; its surge often preludes bigger moves.
signals.questPulse: Watch GRASS closely—green signals could herald market shifts.
signals.worldFeed: Unusual upticks in grass-related assets detected by drones.
signals.clueEvent: Grass scores climbing; encrypted chatter hints at upcoming runs.

signals.npcLine: Legacy tokens like AAVE hold secrets beneath calm surfaces.
signals.questPulse: Seek the old giants; their roots may guard hidden value.
signals.worldFeed: Stable giants move silently in fearful atmospheres.
signals.clueEvent: AAVE shows steady pulse despite market jitters.

signals.npcLine: Sentiment’s low; fear threads through neon-lit alleys tonight.
signals.questPulse: Players hesitate, shadows stretch longer amid crypto gloom.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment alarms flicker red across city databases.
signals.clueEvent: Chatter speaks of unease; trust no silent whispers.
